text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Everyone! I gather you here today to celebrate
your daily efforts! Tracen Academy continues to
thrive in no small part due to your hard work,
opening us to greater possibilities.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
N-no! I should save the formalities for another
time! Let us enjoy this trip to the fullest!
Cheeeers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In response to the academy staff's ever-increasing
workload, we've been invited on a two-day trip
for relaxation.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Um... We've raised our glasses about five times
already, Director.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
She has a tendency to get carried away by the
mood... It appears today even more so.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Perhaps she's sleepy.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Director, I believe it's nearing bedtime. Shall I
take you to your room?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Yes, why thank you!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Phew... Things have finally settled down.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I wonder how Meek is faring with her solo
training. I don't know... I feel like we shouldn't be
the only ones on break.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure she'll be fine. Don't get so hung up!
Forget all about what's at home and enjoy what's
in the now!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Huh? I'm sorry... Who might you be?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Good morning, everyone.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey there! Has your fatigue worn off?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Hm? Yes, thanks to you.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
But Kashimoto aside, you're looking rosy today,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: You spent all day taking in the sights and still look fresh! I've gotta take a leaf out of your book!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: That's true. You were amazing earlier, too!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
You held your ground against the drunk trainers
in that dirt race challenge. When I saw you all
dash down the shore, well... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
At the academy, it's necessary to set a good
example as both an adult and a member of the
staff. However, I'll let you off the hook tonight.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
But only a little. Poor behavior can damage the
reputation of the academy and its students. I
should remind the others just in case...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Now, now! It's fine, we're all adults here! Come
on, just have a seat!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! Could we get two more bottles over
here?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Phew, I'm back. Hehe, the director was well off
into dreamland the minute we made it to her—

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Persons unrelated to the academy shouldn't
be here!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Eeep! Guess it's time to make an early exit!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Welp, I'm outta here! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hey! Stop right there!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: What?! She wasn't your plus one?!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I... I thought she was one of your friends!
